extract: Dudunsparce (Japanese: ノココッチ Nokokocchi) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. It evolves from Dunsparce when leveled up while knowing Hyper Drill. Dudunsparce has two separate forms: Two-Segment Form and Three-Segment Form. When Dunsparce evolves, it has a 1/100 chance of evolving into Three-Segment Form Dudunsparce. (Refer to Game data→Form data for more details.)
